FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Price Holds Above MA20 Amid Mixed Geopolitical Risks
tldr_points: USD/JPY trades above the 20‑day MA, indicating short‑term bullish momentum.
Middle‑East tensions and falling oil provide conflicting safe‑haven cues for USD and JPY.
A long bias is favoured with entry near the MA20, targeting the recent swing high.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY stays above MA20 amid Middle East tensions and lower oil, boosting safe‑haven flows and a near‑term bullish bias
FX.comment: Price above MA20 with supportive fundamentals favours a short‑term long bias.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: MA20 Support Holds Amid Positive Macro & Oil Pull‑back
tldr_points: Oil price decline eases inflation pressure
Fundamentals: low‑rate outlook and resilient earnings
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 trades 7,473, above MA20, supported by softer oil and stable earnings outlook.
STOCKS.comment: Price above MA20 with supportive macro and order flow dynamics

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Price testing MA20 support with institutional demand intact
ETF outflows signal rotation not capitulation, per analysts
Security concerns in ecosystem not yet pricing in broadly
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC tests MA20 support as institutional flows remain resilient despite short-term volatility.
CRYPTO.comment: Price testing MA20 support with institutional demand intact
